rationale: Implementation in merged commit 6b997f3 adds beads-archive collection, Archive() with policy/preserve_dependencies, GetWithArchive for show, ListWithArchive wired to --all, ready/blocked unchanged, and TestArchive* coverage. All 6 AC items satisfied.

findings.summary: Review diff shows only execution evidence files; the substantive implementation lives in merge parent 6b997f3 (cli/internal/bead/archive.go, archive_test.go, registry, store, cmd/bead.go).

Default policy MinAge=30d and MinActiveCount=2000 means archive file only materialises in large/long-lived deployments; opportunistic trigger on Close is fine but the migration command for existing beads.jsonl is correctly deferred to C5.
